title: CleanCircuitDataset
description: Clean circuit dataset produced by extracting circuit data from GIS assets. Maps to the Circuit ontology object.

circuit_id.description: Primary key - unique circuit identifier extracted from GIS asset data

circuit_name.description: Human-readable circuit name, sourced from GIS asset data

voltage_level.description: Voltage level designation for the circuit, sourced from GIS asset data

geographic_zone.description: Geographic zone the circuit belongs to, sourced from GIS asset data

max_wind_threshold_mph.description: Maximum wind speed threshold in mph before risk escalation, sourced from GIS data or Config
